case_title: GUILLERMO MACALPIN VS. NAOMI ROCHON BEAUDOIN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER [ORIGINALLY FILED JAN-11-2018] FILED BY DEFENDANT BEAUDOIN, NAOMI ROCHON
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-06-2019 CONTINUED TO MAR-06-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
*** REGISTER OF ACTIONS - TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS COURT NO. CSM-17-856351 - TO BE HEARD WITH RELATED CASE CGC-17-562315 - FILINGS FROM SEP-28-2017 THROUGH JAN-16-2018 - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS***
ORDER GRANTING CASE TRANSSFERRED TO CIVIL JURISDICTION TO JOIN PENDING CIVIL CASE [ORIGINALLY FILED JAN-24-2018]
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-16-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACALPIN, GUILLERMO AS TO DEFENDANT BEAUDOIN, NAOMI ROCHON NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-06-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-05-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-14-2019
AMENDED PLAINTIFF'S CLIAM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT [ORIGINALLY FILED OCT-16-2017] FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACALPIN, GUILLERMO

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-16-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAR-06-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF FILING AND TRANSMITTAL - CASE TO BE HEARD WITH CGC-17-562315 (TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS CASE CSM-17-856351)
